note: OWNER-CONTROLLED. The ONLY place maker credits may live. No machine writes to this file. A designed face has PLURAL, TYPED makers, so each decision lists credits, and each credit cites one substantive (verified, pinned, DS9-applicable, performance-matched) evidence item whose maker and maker_type it must match. A pinned quote is provenance, not applicability: species-design, cross-production, and multi-performer-unnamed quotes are context and cannot support a credit. Anything not decided here stays `review`.

credits.maker: the maker string, exactly as named by the cited evidence item
credits.role: makeup_supervisor | makeup_artist | prosthetics | creature_effects | designer | sculptor | mask_or_suit | unknown (must equal the cited item's maker_type)
credits.evidence_id: a content-addressed id of a SUBSTANTIVE evidence item in this performance's dossier
